title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 387.020 - Definitions
text:
387.020.  Definitions. — The provisions of sections 390.020 and 622.100 defining words, phrases and terms shall apply to and determine the meaning of all such words, phrases or terms as used in sections 387.010 to 387.340.
(1949 H.B. 2100 § 387.02, A.L. 1996 S.B. 780) 
Definitions applicable to this chapter, 622.100
